Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs."in.comstock_building_type" NOT IN ('Warehouse', 'SmallOffice')) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4b9f12f7da64321271ff3cc794f46fe4667738e0cfab1eff436001b2ec5546c2/5bf1b9aa-4754-40ca-aeef-d59831217b71/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
